name: My employer says my hearing protection use means no claim, is that true in Utah?
description: No, harmful noise exposure still compensable.[2]

mainEntity.name: My employer says my hearing protection use means no claim, is that true in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, harmful noise exposure still compensable.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, consistent protection use reduces but doesn't bar claims if ambient noise exceeded harmful levels per Utah Code §34A-2-503.** Courts consider actual noise reaching ears, but prove exposure caused loss despite protection.[2] Get independent noise dosimetry tests. Employer defenses often fail with strong medical links.[2] Challenge via appeal.
